svg.title: RevCycleMGMT EDI Validation Harness proof
svg.desc: Synthetic four-view EDI validation workspace: submission readiness, failure catalog, payer variance map, and 30-day readiness plan.

"Diagnosis pointer order failed", "trigger": "Primary diagnosis pointer is not first on the service line.", "fix": "Coder reviews diagnosis ordering before the batch closes.", "frequency": 12, closeout.", "fix": "Repair envelope generation and rerun validator.", "frequency": 9, "dollars_at_risk": 5100, "category": "Envelope repair", "owner": "Biller", "evidence": "Missing required envelope segment IEA." }, { "name": "Service location incomplete", "trigger": "Claim lacks the service-location information required by payer rule.", "fix": "Front desk completes location field before claim svg.text: Catch batch defects before claims leave the building.
Ready to submit: 412 of 487 synthetic claims with failure mix, repair catalog, payer variance, and owner-ready readiness plan.
Rules reused from proof harness TRANSACTION_RULES.
837P required segments: BHT / NM1 / CLM / LX / SV1.
Envelope checks: ISA / GS / ST / SE / GE / IEA.
Business rules remain synthetic payer-specific rules.
Days 1-3 | Biller | M | Missing rendering provider record
Assign rendering owner and complete provider record before release. Impact: Unblocks 14-18 synthetic claims per week and about $8K weekly exposure.
Days 4-7 | Coder | S | Service line not attached
Hold the claim until charge capture attaches a service line. Impact: Unblocks 10-14 synthetic claims per week and reduces service-line repair.
Days 8-12 | Front desk | M | Synthetic Payer D
Authorization reference format needs intake cleanup. Impact: Unblocks 13 synthetic claims per week and $7,200 weekly exposure.
Days 13-18 | Biller | M | Control numbers do not match
Regenerate the batch envelope before any payer route. Impact: Reduces envelope rework before the next batch is staged.
Days 19-24 | Coder | S | Synthetic Payer B
Diagnosis pointer order is the main blocker. Impact: Unblocks 11 synthetic claims per week.
Days 25-30 | Front desk | S | Synthetic Payer A
Service location required before release. Impact: Unblocks 9 synthetic claims per week.
All segment values, payer labels, claim IDs, dollar figures, and validation outcomes are synthetic demo data.
